message:
Command `find /nc -name "ipm" -type f 2>/dev/null | head -10
which ipm 2>/dev/null || echo "ipm not on PATH"
find /usr /opt /home -name "ipm" -type f 2>/dev/null | head -10
ls /nc/ip/ 2>/dev/null | head -20` executed with exit code 0.

function.arguments:
{"command": "find /nc -name "ipm" -type f 2>/dev/null | head -10
which ipm 2>/dev/null || echo "ipm not on PATH"
find /usr /opt /home -name "ipm" -type f 2>/dev/null | head -10
ls /nc/ip/ 2>/dev/null | head -20"}
